mapper.sql: select id, slug, locale, title, subtitle, tags, cover_url, description, content, content_cleared_at, content_auto_clear_days, content_backup_key, content_type, generation_id, author, keywords, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, share_count, is_hot, allow_comment, publish_time, master_article_id, storage_config_id, storage_key, storage_url, path_rule, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, sort_order, status, remote_file_status, last_sync_check_time, remote_file_size, remote_file_hash, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from gb_articles

if.test: queryMode != null and queryMode == 'related' and siteId != null

mapper.select: select a.*, m.site_id as site_id, m.category_id as category_id, m.sort_order as sort_order, m.is_top as is_top, m.is_recommend as is_recommend, m.publish_time as publish_time, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon, -- 关联板块信息（通过分类的父级） CASE WHEN c.parent_id = 0 THEN c.id ELSE c.parent_id END as section_id, CASE WHEN c.parent_id = 0 THEN c.name ELSE (SELECT name FROM gb_categories WHERE id = c.parent_id AND del_flag = '0') END as section_name, sc.name as storage_config_name, sc.category_id as storage_category_id, scat.name as storage_category_name from gb_articles a inner join gb_master_articles m on a.master_article_id = m.id and m.del_flag = '0' left join gb_categories c on m.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' left join gb_storage_configs sc on a.storage_config_id = sc.id and sc.del_flag = '0' left join gb_categories scat on sc.category_id = scat.id and scat.del_flag = '0' where a.id = #{id} and a.del_flag = '0'

select a.*, m.site_id as site_id, m.category_id as category_id, m.sort_order as sort_order, m.is_top as is_top, m.is_recommend as is_recommend, m.publish_time as publish_time, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon from gb_articles a inner join gb_master_articles m on a.master_article_id = m.id and m.del_flag = '0' left join gb_categories c on m.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' where a.del_flag = '0' order by a.id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_articles
slug, locale, title, subtitle, tags, cover_url, description, content, content_cleared_at, content_auto_clear_days, content_backup_key, content_type, generation_id, author, keywords, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, share_count, is_hot, allow_comment, master_article_id, storage_config_id, storage_key, storage_url, path_rule, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, publish_time,
#{slug}, #{locale}, #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{tags}, #{coverUrl}, #{description}, #{content}, #{contentClearedAt}, #{contentAutoClearDays}, #{contentBackupKey}, #{contentType}, #{generationId}, #{author}, #{keywords}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, #{shareCount}, #{isHot}, #{allowComment}, #{masterArticleId}, #{storageConfigId}, #{storageKey}, #{storageUrl}, #{pathRule}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoKeywords}, #{seoDescription}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{publishTime},
mapper.update: update gb_articles set del_flag = '2', deleted_at = NOW() where id = #{id}

update gb_articles set del_flag = '2', deleted_at = NOW() where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM gb_articles a WHERE a.master_article_id = #{masterArticleId} AND a.del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE gb_articles SET del_flag = '2', deleted_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE master_article_id = #{masterArticleId} AND del_flag = '0'
update gb_articles set status = #{status}, storage_key = #{storageKey}, storage_url = #{storageUrl}, path_rule = #{pathRule}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select locale from gb_articles where master_article_id = #{masterArticleId} and del_flag = '0'
